education.institution: Suffolk University - Sawyer School of Management

experience.title: Director of Information Technology
experience.description: Provided application and network support services for the MSBA. Maintained a rackspace hosted asp.net solution tied to SQL Server. Refreshed hardware and software, and brought the development group up to sql server, tfs, and VS 2012. Rewrote utility and security library from VB.NET to C# and added many more classes to support more static helper functions. Developed an architecture based on object modeling for a middle tier. Served as the project manager for all current projects and provided business analysis to work out business workflows for the team.

experience.title: Team Leader
experience.description: Lead clinical and research programming development and application support for applications developed by the group for the Cardiovascular Program. Project managed the effort to replace a number of legacy systems with modern C# applications. Maintained professional and clinical billing for the cardiology department. Developed and maintained research applications for the cardiology's research department.

experience.title: Chief Information Officer
experience.description: Provided network, application and help desk support for the largest agency in the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, The Department of Mental Retardation. Upgraded to Zen 5.0 of Novell and remotely managed desktops. Developed client server model applications and the electronic service delivery model which was hosted in the facility with ITD's assistance.

experience.title: Director of Applications Development
experience.description: Provided application development and support services to the Department of Youth Services. Led the Year 2000 project to convert the Natural/Adabas mainframe system to a ASP web based application YSIS.
